current.summary: MOAT spec issues 6-7 resolved with OWASP alignment verification; issue 8 (revocation) queued

activeWork.description: Resolving open questions in MOAT specification outline: issue #6 (scan_status structure), issue #7 (risk_tier classification), OWASP compliance cross-check
activeWork.progress: Issues #6 and #7 fully resolved with decisions documented in moat-revised-outline.md. Cross-checked against 7 OWASP standards (AST, ASI, LLM, Web App, API, CI/CD) — all 4 relevant lists aligned with decisions. Updated OWASP coverage tables. Identified one gap (CIDC-SEC-8 ungoverned federation trust) for future spec work. Committed and pushed.

git.lastCommit: moat-revised-outline.md: Issues 6-7 resolved, OWASP coverage updated

recentDecisions: Issue #6: scan_status={not_scanned, clean, findings}, risk_tier={not_analyzed, indeterminate, L0-L3}
Issue #7: Registry assigns capability-based risk classification; behavioral specs require registry-level analysis
Verified alignment with AST08/09, ASI04, LLM03/04, CICD-SEC-9
nextSteps: Future: Address CICD-SEC-8 gap (ungoverned 3rd-party services federation trust)

context.notes: OWASP research surfaced distinction: OWASP Agentic Skills Top 10 (AST, GitHub-hosted) vs OWASP Agentic Applications 2026 (ASI, genai.owasp.org). Both cited separately in outline. File location: /home/hhewett/.local/src/moat/docs/moat-revised-outline.md. Ready to continue with issue #8.
